2606.16687.title: From Affect Prediction to Affect Forecasting: Evidence for Distinct Information Sources in Longitudinal Text
2606.16687.paper_summary: Modeling dimensional affect in longitudinal text requires distinguishing current affect estimation from future affective change forecasting. Existing approaches often treat each text as an independent observation and apply similar assumptions to both tasks, without testing whether they rely on different information sources. This paper investigates that distinction using longitudinal self-reported ecological essays and feeling-word entries. We propose the Trait--State Affective Prediction (TSAP) framework and its temporal extension E-TSAP for per-text valence and arousal prediction, evaluated on a held-out prediction test set of 1,737 entries from 91 users. We further propose the Affective Change Forecaster Hybrid (ACF-Hybrid) for next-step affective change forecasting, evaluated on a held-out forecasting test set of 46 users. For prediction, E-TSAP achieves composite Pearson correlations of 0.670 for valence and 0.449 for arousal. For forecasting, textual representations perform worse than compact numeric trajectory baselines: the text-inclusive model achieves only r=0.316 for valence and r=0.284 for arousal, whereas a simple prior-state baseline reaches r=0.615 and r=0.670, respectively. ACF-Hybrid, using dimension-specific numeric trajectory features, achieves r=0.659 for valence and $r=0.658$ for arousal. These results show that textual semantics support current affect prediction, whereas future affective change is better captured through prior numeric trajectory dynamics.
2606.16687.paper_summary_zh: 建模長期文本中的維度情感需要區分當前情感估計與未來情感變化預測。現有的方法通常將每個文本視為獨立觀察，並對這兩個任務應用相似的假設，而未測試它們是否依賴於不同的信息來源。本文使用長期自我報告的生態散文和情感詞條來調查這一區別。我們提出了特質--狀態情感預測（TSAP）框架及其時間擴展E-TSAP，用於每個文本的價值和喚醒預測，並在91位用戶的1,737條條目的保留預測測試集上進行評估。我們進一步提出了情感變化預測混合模型（ACF-Hybrid），用於下一步情感變化預測，在46位用戶的保留預測測試集上進行評估。對於預測，E-TSAP在價值上的複合皮爾森相關係數為0.670，在喚醒上的為0.449。對於預測，文本表示的表現不如緊湊的數值軌跡基準：包含文本的模型在價值上僅達到r=0.316，在喚醒上為r=0.284，而簡單的先前狀態基準分別達到r=0.615和r=0.670。ACF-Hybrid使用特定維度的數值軌跡特徵，在價值上達到r=0.659，在喚醒上為$r=0.658$。這些結果表明，文本語義支持當前情感預測，而未來情感變化則更好地通過先前的數值軌跡動態來捕捉。
2606.16687.author: Sadia Noor et.al.
2606.16687.authors: Sadia Noor, Seemab Latif, Raja Khurram Shahzad, Mehwish Fatima
